steps.t: The Uruk Gâmzhurm can be found south and slightly west of Echad Dúnann, across Nan Sirannon. You must use the horn of challenge to summon Gâmzhurm, th…
Glavroleth is at Echad Dúnann, north and slightly east of Porth Cadlus. You should return to Glavroleth with the news of Gâmzhurm's death.
